sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105715" key="trupanou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρυπᾰν-οῦχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n105715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">handle of a borer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.113</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.146</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
